race.comment: MATROOSHI (6) ran below expectations last time at Casterton, finishing sixth and beaten 7 lengths starting at $5.50. Has the ability to produce a better result now at peak fitness providing she gets an OK run from the wide gate. DARTS DALY (2) finished out of the money two starts back then was beaten 6 lengths when fifth in a 1500m contest at Ballarat Synthetic three-and-a-half weeks ago. Best figures measure up nicely and gets blinkers here, which could spark improvement. ROYAL INFERENCE (3) has raced well this prep and draws for another good showing. MOSQUITO AWARD (4) hit the frame two starts ago at Ballarat Synthetic but ran below par last time when sixth and beaten 2.5 lengths over 1200m at Ballarat Synthetic. Finds a nice race and can make amends.
